---
title: "Introduction to the Finite Element Method"
subtitle: "Lecture 1: Introduction + 1D Setup"
format: 
    revealjs:
        slide-number: true
        incremental: true
        center: true
        transition: slide
        margin: 0.1
        css: fem.css
execute:
  echo: true # Show code by default (we'll override for folding)
  warning: false
jupyter: python3
---

## Setup

```{python}
#| include: false # Usually hide the setup chunk itself

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import sympy as sp
from IPython.display import Math, display

# Import functions FROM your saved .py file
import L1 as fem 
```

## s

```{python}
#| code-fold: true
#| echo: fenced
fem.display_strong_form()
```

## Strong Form {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| code-fold: true
#| echo: fenced
fem.derive_weak_form()
```
